probe-blue.purpose: Active / comparing / focused algorithm state. Brand color.

verified-jade.purpose: Done / sorted / found / correct algorithm state.

filament-amber.purpose: In flight / swapping / writing / transient state.

beam-yellow.purpose: Path highlight on graphs and trees only.

error-red.purpose: Application errors only. Never algorithm state.

headline.purpose: Page titles inside the app shell.

notation.purpose: Mono — code, complexity, variable names. Never UI chrome.

shadows.name: focus-glow
shadows.purpose: Keyboard focus halo on interactive elements (not inputs).

shadows.name: canvas-lamp
shadows.purpose: The 'pool of light' under the active visualization canvas. One per page.

shadows.name: card-hover
shadows.purpose: Home-page topic-card hover. Tinted to the card's accent color in practice.

motion.name: ease-quiet
motion.purpose: Default ease-out-quart. Hover transitions, surface lifts, opacity reveals.

motion.name: ease-step
motion.purpose: Ease-out-expo. Algorithm-step transitions where the destination should land softly.

motion.name: ease-trace
motion.purpose: Smooth cubic in-out. Path tracing on graphs and recurrence chains in DP.

motion.name: duration-step
motion.purpose: Default algorithm step duration at 1x speed.

motion.name: duration-merge
motion.purpose: Recursion descents and merges that need a beat to be readable.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Principal action on a page. At most one Primary visible at a time.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #4f7cf8; color: #fff; padding: 8px 14px; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 12.5px; font-weight: 600; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 120ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { opacity: 0.85; } .ds-btn-primary:active { opacity: 0.7; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(79, 124, 248, 0.25); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary actions, tool buttons, and most controls.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: transparent; color: #606888; padding: 6px 12px; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 12.5px; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid #1a1f38; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 120ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), color 120ms; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #141828; color: #d0d5ec; border-color: #4f7cf8; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(79, 124, 248, 0.25); }

components.name: Topic Card
components.description: Home-page navigation card. Hovers lift with an accent-tinted glow.
components.css: .ds-card-topic { background: #0b0d1c; border: 1px solid #1a1f38; border-radius: 10px; padding: 22px; cursor: pointer; text-align: left; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; color: #d0d5ec; transition: transform 200ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), border-color 200ms, box-shadow 200ms; } .ds-card-topic:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); border-color: rgba(79, 124, 248, 0.67); box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(79, 124, 248, 0.16); } .ds-card-head { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; } .ds-card-arrow { font-size: 20px; font-weight: 300; color: #4f7cf8; opacity: 0; transform: translateX(-6px); transition: all 200ms; } .ds-card-topic:hover .ds-card-arrow { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(0); } .ds-card-title { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.01em; color: #d0d5ec; } .ds-card-desc { font-size: 12.5px; color: #606888; line-height: 1.65; flex: 1; } .ds-card-tags { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 5px; } .ds-chip { padding: 2px 9px; border: 1px solid rgba(79, 124, 248, 0.33); border-radius: 999px; font-size: 10.5px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-weight: 500; color: rgba(79, 124, 248, 0.8); }

components.name: Input
components.description: Mono-typed text/number input. Border carries focus state.
components.css: .ds-input { background: #0f1120; border: 1px solid #1a1f38; border-radius: 6px; color: #d0d5ec; padding: 7px 10px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 13px; outline: none; transition: border-color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #4f7cf8; }

components.name: Chip
components.description: Algorithm tag. Read-only data label, not interactive.
components.css: .ds-chip-tag { display: inline-block; padding: 2px 9px; background: transparent; border: 1px solid rgba(79, 124, 248, 0.33); border-radius: 999px; color: rgba(79, 124, 248, 0.8); font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 10.5px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.02em; }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Link
components.description: App-shell navigation. Active route shown by accent left bar.
components.html: Sorting
components.css: .ds-nav-link { width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; padding: 10px 18px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 9px; position: relative; text-align: left; color: #606888; text-decoration: none; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 13.5px; font-weight: 400; background: transparent; transition: all 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-nav-link:hover:not(.ds-nav-link-active) { color: #d0d5ec; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.02); } .ds-nav-link-active { color: #d0d5ec; font-weight: 600; } .ds-nav-bar { position: absolute; left: 0; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); width: 3px; height: 18px; border-radius: 0 2px 2px 0; background: transparent; transition: background 150ms; } .ds-nav-link-active .ds-nav-bar { background: var(--accent, #4f7cf8); } .ds-nav-link:hover:not(.ds-nav-link-active) .ds-nav-bar { background: var(--accent, #4f7cf8); } .ds-nav-icon { display: flex; align-items: center; color: #404870; } .ds-nav-link-active .ds-nav-icon, .ds-nav-link:hover .ds-nav-icon { color: var(--accent, #4f7cf8); }

components.name: Step Control Bar
components.description: Signature component. Floating bottom bar replacing right-side panels on visualization screens.
components.html: step 34 / 96
components.css: .ds-step-bar { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; background: #141828; border: 1px solid #1a1f38; border-radius: 10px; padding: 6px 8px; box-shadow: 0 24px 80px -32px rgba(79, 124, 248, 0.18); font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; } .ds-step-btn { width: 32px; height: 32px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: transparent; color: #606888; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 120ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-step-btn:hover { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04); color: #d0d5ec; } .ds-step-btn:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(79, 124, 248, 0.25); } .ds-step-btn.ds-step-play { color: #4f7cf8; } .ds-step-btn.ds-step-play:hover { background: rgba(79, 124, 248, 0.12); } .ds-step-divider { width: 1px; height: 22px; background: #1a1f38; margin: 0 6px; } .ds-step-scrub { width: 220px; display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 0 6px; } .ds-step-range { width: 100%; appearance: none; height: 4px; border-radius: 2px; background: #1a1f38; accent-color: #4f7cf8; outline: none; } .ds-step-range::-webkit-slider-thumb { appearance: none; width: 12px; height: 12px; border-radius: 50%; background: #4f7cf8; cursor: pointer; } .ds-step-meta { padding: 0 10px 0 4px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #606888; letter-spacing: 0.02em; }

components.name: Visualization Canvas
components.description: The hero performance surface. Owns at least 60% of every visualization page.
components.html: O(n log n) · n = 32
components.css: .ds-canvas { position: relative; background: #0b0d1c; border-radius: 14px; padding: clamp(20px, 3vw, 44px); box-shadow: 0 24px 80px -32px rgba(79, 124, 248, 0.18); font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; min-height: 280px; } .ds-canvas-overlay-tr { position: absolute; top: 18px; right: 22px; } .ds-canvas-notation { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 13px; color: #606888; letter-spacing: 0.02em; } .ds-canvas-stage { display: flex; align-items: flex-end; justify-content: center; padding-top: 18px; }

narrative.overview: Imagine a CS student at one in the morning. The room is dark. A single warm desk lamp pools light across an open textbook and a quiet laptop. The work is hard but unhurried. The interface is mostly dark, mostly still, mostly silent. When the canvas moves, it moves the way a thought moves: with intent, in sequence, with a beat of pause between steps. Color enters sparingly and means something every time it does.
keyCharacteristics: One focal area per screen. Everything else is desk surface.
Warm-on-dark. Text and accents are tinted, never pure white on pure black.
Choreographed motion, not interpolation. Transitions encode meaning.
A single complexity notation, set in mono, beats a table of six.
Borders are ghost-thin or absent. Depth comes from tonal layering, not strokes.

rules.name: The Algorithm State Quartet Rule
rules.body: Algorithm-state encoding is restricted to four hues: Probe Blue (active), Verified Jade (done), Filament Amber (in flight), Tracer Violet (special). Red is reserved for application errors.

rules.name: The Single Pool Rule
rules.body: Each screen has exactly one focal area lit by one accent at any given moment. Two simultaneous accents on the same surface compete and turn the canvas into a circus.

rules.name: The No-Pure-Black Rule
rules.body: #000000 is forbidden. Carbon Indigo (#070811) is the floor.

rules.name: The Mono Voice Rule
rules.body: JetBrains Mono is reserved for data — code, complexity notations, variable names, numeric values inside a visualization. It must not appear on UI chrome.

rules.name: The One Notation Rule
rules.body: Each visualization shows exactly one complexity notation in scannable position. A table of best/worst/average/space is offered behind progressive disclosure, never in the default view.

rules.name: The 65ch Cap
rules.body: Pedagogical prose never exceeds 75 characters per line, ideally 65.

rules.name: The One Lamp Rule
rules.body: A page may have at most one Canvas Lamp shadow. Two lamps means there is no focus.

rules.name: The Ghost Border Rule
rules.body: Default borders are 1px in Border Soft. Stronger borders are forbidden on content surfaces. Colored borders (a blue stripe on a card, a green left-edge accent) are forbidden everywhere.

dos: Do anchor every page on a single hero canvas. The canvas earns at least 60% of the visible area.
Do restrict algorithm-state color to the quartet: Probe Blue, Verified Jade, Filament Amber, Tracer Violet.
Do use Carbon Indigo (#070811) for the deepest surface. Pure black is forbidden.
Do use tonal layering (Carbon → Panel → Hover Indigo) for depth before reaching for a shadow.
Do show exactly one complexity notation per visualization, set in JetBrains Mono.
Do write motion that encodes meaning. The merge step in merge sort is the lesson; choreograph it.
Do honor prefers-reduced-motion by softening timing and shortening travel, not by stripping animation.
Do keep voice unhurried and lecturer-grade. Short sentences. No exclamation marks. No 'Let's dive in!'
donts: Don't use side-stripe borders (a border-left greater than 1px as a colored accent on cards, list items, panels).
Don't build the page with a permanent right-side panel of metrics, parameters, and controls.
Don't show panels-of-everything: best-case / worst-case / average / space-complexity tables in the default view.
Don't use #000000, #ffffff, or any pure CSS named color.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text + linear-gradient).
Don't use glassmorphism, backdrop blur, or ambient frosted-glass surfaces.
Don't use red and green together to encode opposite algorithm states.
Don't use kid-coding aesthetics — bright primaries, cartoon mascots, rocket emoji.
Don't ship the LLM dark-mode-with-purple-gradient hero template.
Don't animate CSS layout properties (width, height, top, left, margin). Animate transform, opacity, SVG attributes.
Don't write multi-paragraph explanatory blocks beside the visualization.
